name: Chocolate Chip Sour Cream Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Stir together flour and baking soda in a bowl.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat sugar and butter until fluffy.
4. Beat in eggs, one at a time, until smooth; add vanilla.
5. Mix in sour cream alternately with the flour mixture.
6. Fold in chocolate chips.
7. Grease and flour a 10-inch fluted tube cake pan.
8. Pour batter into the prepared pan.
9. Bake for 1 hour and 15 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted comes out clean.
10. Cool; remove from pan.
11. Sprinkle with confectioners' sugar if desired.
